description: The `OsVersion` DSC resource is used to assert a minimum Windows operating system version requirement.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `OsVersion` DSC resource is used to assert a minimum Windows operating system version requirement.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

MinVersion.title: MinVersion
MinVersion.description: The minimum required version of the operating system. This is a mandatory property.

OsVersion.title: OsVersion
OsVersion.description:
A read-only property indicating the current operating system version.
        This property is not configurable.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/OsVersion
